scripts.dev:question: npm --prefix question-service run dev
scripts.dev:services: concurrently -n user,question,collab "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:question" "npm run dev:collab"
scripts.dev: npm run dev:clean && concurrently -k -n services,gateway,frontend "npm run dev:services" "npx wait-on http://localhost:3001 http://localhost:8080 && npm run dev:gateway" "npx wait-on http://localhost:3000 && npm run dev:frontend"
